prompt: Detect and highlight all faces in the image that are visually similar to the reference face.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1. Identify all faces in image 1 that are visually similar to the face shown in image 2. Clearly outline or draw a bounding box around each identified face. This includes, but is not limited to, the faces of the two basketball players in the foreground of image 1 (the one on the left and the one on the right).
objects: outline or bounding box around the face of the basketball player on the left
outline or bounding box around the face of the basketball player on the right
outline or bounding box around any other identified similar face in the image
